testcase.name: cache miss synthesizes exactly once then atomically stores
http error exposes safe Google reason instead of hiding response body
cache key is stable and excludes playback speed
http error without Google message gives restriction guidance
cache hit never invokes remote and works without api key
catalog exposes Korean Standard and WaveNet A through D with WaveNet A default
saved cloud voice is normalized to selected playback mode
cloud diagnostics show actual provider voice and cache
settings validation requires key only when cloud cache misses
